subcodes.first_line: The effulgent splendors of Glory have not restrained the rustling of the Most Glorious Pen, nor have the veils of the wayward held back His purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحات جلال صریر قلم ابهی را منع ننموده و حجبات اهل ضلال او را از اراده باز
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
